meaning: n.[动]白肢野牛,印度野牛(产于印度,缅甸等国,是现存最大的野牛)
examples: In the book there are 5 pics of gaur killed and eaten by tigers.
As a large group they can attack even gaur, leopard and even tiger.
Was a gaur expert, but ultimately was killed in a fight with a bull gaur.
Amidst the flurry of construction activity, with an entourage of 10 people, Gaur expressed his displeasure.
An endangered wild ox, called a gaur, and a banteng (wild cattle) have also been successfully cloned.
